meaning: prep....的,由...制成的,离,关于,对于
examples: One of the penalties of fame is loss of privacy.
Lack of traffic is one of the blessings of country life.
There were periods of sulking, of pronounced distance, of coldness.
Other tricks used to win included not running the right number of laps in cross-country races.
The administrators said they hope to sell most of the business as a going concern.
